headline: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canada: Markets are accustomed to 'heavy hand' tactic
summary: The Trump administration has imposed a 50% tariff on certain Canadian goods, which includes imports previously protected under the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA). Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Cooné is joined by Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Ines Ferre in gauging the muted market reaction to these new trade policies, how the US consumer is faring, and what earnings from General Motors (GM) may indicate about consumer health.
